item_specifications.special_feature: Chewproof, Comfortable, Easy Assembly, Eco-Friendly, Lockable

about_item: 【A 2-in-1 Haven for You & Your Dog】This stylish modern dog crate is the perfect shared space. It creates a safe, cozy retreat for your furry friend while functioning seamlessly as a chic side table or nightstand—complete with a charging station. It's the furniture that truly fits both your lives

【Built-in 4-Device Charging Station】This dog kennel indoor stays fully powered with 2 AC outlets, 1 USB-A, and 1 USB-C port. Charge your phone, tablet, and your dog's smart collar or electronic toys—all at once. Convenience is built right in

【Space-Saving Flip-Up Door】The clear acrylic door features a clever flip-up design that tucks neatly under the top, saving floor space and preventing bumps. When closed, it gives your pet a reassuring view of the room, helping to ease anxiety

【Safety & Comfort, Engineered In】Crafted from FSC-certified wood, premium pet-safe boards, and durable acrylic, this cage provides a secure and comfortable sanctuary. The smooth, hazard-free interior offers superior comfort compared to traditional wire crates

【Spacious, Comfort-Fit Interior】Generous interior dimensions (24.2"L x 36.6"W x 29.5"H) provide ample room for dogs up to 110lbs (e.g., French Bulldogs, Corgis) to stand, turn, and rest comfortably. Please measure your dog to confirm the perfect fit

【40-Minute Assembly】Pre-drilled parts with numbering tags, clear manual for hassle-free assembly. Includes step-by-step video guide in product page - no extra tools required! (Assembly time verified by 1,200+ verified buyers)

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate's design aesthetically pleasing and appreciate its great quality and easy assembly. They describe it as spacious, with one customer noting it's suitable for large and medium breeds up to 110 pounds. The value for money receives mixed feedback, with several customers praising the quality relative to the price.

authors_reviews.title: My puppy loves it
authors_reviews.text: The combination of the nightstand and dog crate is excellent. It is very spacious, and my puppy loves spending time inside. Assembly was easy, and the structure feels sturdy and secure, so I am not worried about my dog damaging it. The built-in power outlet on the top of the cabinet is also very convenient and thoughtfully designed.
authors_reviews.author: Ran Zhu

authors_reviews.title: Good purchase
authors_reviews.text: It’s definitely prettier than many other cages! I did dock a star because it’s made of cheaper wood material :/. The pull out drawer isn’t all wood which I didn’t realize before purchasing. It’s a collapsable drawer. The actual storage part is made out of fabric. however it still works perfectly for my doodle. She’s a year and about 60lbs.It was also very easy to build! I do think the price should be a bit less due to the quality of wood
authors_reviews.author: EZZY

authors_reviews.title: My dog likes!
authors_reviews.text: Beautifully designed and sturdy, this modern dog crate doubles as elegant furniture. The hidden acrylic door is convenient, spacious for large breeds, and the charging station is practical. High quality wood, easy assembly, blends perfectly with home decor. My dog loves it and feels safe and comfortable inside daily.
authors_reviews.author: Stefani H

authors_reviews.title: Great dog crate
authors_reviews.text: High quality. Easy to assemble. Nice aesthetic.
authors_reviews.author: Kelly J Bittner

authors_reviews.title: Attractive, takes time to set up, would still recommend
authors_reviews.text: Looks great and perfect for my puppy. If your puppy hates to be alone, then use a different crate for that as I’m not sure how well the door would stay closed for a very determined puppy. Took me some time to set up but each piece was labeled so it easy. Sturdy and very happy with the price and now I have something that looks good rather than an ugly crate (still have one of those in another room/ this one is the bedtime crate)
authors_reviews.author: Interrupted Reading

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: put it together by myself in about 2 hrs. it’s very large wish i would of gotten the smaller one even with my 90lb lab. my only complain is that one of the corners came ripped.
authors_reviews.author: Kelly Hasten

authors_reviews.title: Stylish and Practical Dog Crate
authors_reviews.text: We’re really happy with this dog crate night stand. It looks beautiful in our home, feels sturdy, and there is even a hidden door. It gives our pup a cozy space while also working perfectly as a night stand. A lovely mix of style and function.
authors_reviews.author: PB

authors_reviews.title: Great size. Door cracked broken
authors_reviews.text: Like the size and everything but the door came cracked and ended up splitting in half a week later
authors_reviews.author: Jazmin
